title: callicarpa angusta
intro: Callicarpa angusta, also known as the narrow purple callicarpa, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its vibrant purple berries. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Callicarpa angusta include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Callicarpa angusta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
